name: @ai-factory/agent-schema
description: JSON schemas and validation utilities for AI Factory agents and tools

scripts.validate:samples: node -e "const v = require('./validator'); const fs = require('fs'); ['production-agent', 'sales-agent'].forEach(f => { const a = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('./samples/' + f + '.json')); const r = v.validateAgentConfig(a); console.log(f + ':', r.valid ? 'VALID' : 'INVALID', r.errors || ''); });"

author: AI Factory Team
